formalization_risks: No missing notation or ambiguity; standard determinant property.

needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: Core theorem for transpose determinant equality.

planned_declarations.target_statement_sketch: For any square matrix A over a commutative ring, det(Aᵀ) = det(A).

formalization_risks: Need to handle both lower- and upper-triangular cases; may need separate lemmas or a single theorem with a condition.

missing_or_uncertain_context: Whether Mathlib has a lemma for determinant of triangular matrices; if not, need to prove using row operations or induction.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: det_triangular : ∀ (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) K), (Triangular A) → det A = ∏ i, A i i
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: Main theorem for triangular matrix determinant.
To express the hypothesis that A is triangular.

needed_project_context.name: det_scale_row, det_add_smul_row, det_zero_row, det_swap_rows
needed_project_context.why_needed: Row operation lemmas from thm.det.rowop may be used in proof.

planned_declarations.target_statement_sketch: For a triangular matrix A (lower or upper), det A equals product of diagonal entries.

units.source_focus_summary: Determinant of triangular matrix equals product of diagonal entries.

formalization_risks: Need to handle permutation sign; may need to use existing Mathlib lemma for determinant under row/column permutation.

missing_or_uncertain_context: Exact Mathlib lemma for determinant under row permutation by a permutation τ.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: det_permute_rows : det (A ∘ τ) = sign τ * det A
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: Core lemma for row permutation effect on determinant.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: det_permute_cols : det (A.submatrix id τ) = sign τ * det A
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: Core lemma for column permutation effect on determinant.

needed_project_context.name: det_swap_rows, det_swap_cols
needed_project_context.why_needed: May be used to prove the general permutation case via decomposition into swaps.

planned_declarations.target_statement_sketch: For a matrix A and permutation τ, det of matrix with rows permuted by τ equals sign(τ) * det A; similarly for columns.

units.source_focus_summary: Determinant under row/column permutation by a permutation τ.
